x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Developer user volume determines the scale of productivity gains from Now Assist Code Generation. More active developers means greater aggregate time savings from AI-assisted scripting, flow creation, and application development.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Identify and onboard developers to Now Assist for Creator to maximize AI code generation adoption.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_dbf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c09
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Developer user volume determines the scale of productivity gains from Now Assist Code Generation. More active developers means greater aggregate time savings from AI-assisted scripting, flow creation, and application development.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Developer User Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sys_user_has_role");
ga.addQuery("role.name","IN","admin,mid_server,app_engine_developer,delegated_developer");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=10)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" developers",finding:c+" users with developer roles found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" developers",finding:c+" developer(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 developers",finding:"No users with developer roles found."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CREATOR</module><number>CHK0000564</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Identify and onboard developers to Now Assist for Creator to maximize AI code generation adoption.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>dbf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c09</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Developer User Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_dbf89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c09</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
